Struct ProgressBar.ProgressBarTemplateSettings

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

The computed translate positions WinUI binds from ProgressBarTemplateSettings into the indeterminate storyboards (ProgressBar.cpp UpdateWidthBasedTemplateSettings). Indicator widths follow SetProgressBarIndicatorWidth.

public readonly record struct ProgressBar.ProgressBarTemplateSettings : IEquatable<ProgressBar.ProgressBarTemplateSettings>
Implements
IEquatable<ProgressBar.ProgressBarTemplateSettings>

Constructors

ProgressBarTemplateSettings(float, float, float, float, float, float)

The computed translate positions WinUI binds from ProgressBarTemplateSettings into the indeterminate storyboards (ProgressBar.cpp UpdateWidthBasedTemplateSettings). Indicator widths follow SetProgressBarIndicatorWidth.

public ProgressBarTemplateSettings(float Indicator1Width, float Indicator2Width, float ContainerAnimationStartPosition, float ContainerAnimationEndPosition, float Container2AnimationStartPosition, float Container2AnimationEndPosition)

Indicator2Width float

ProgressBar.ProgressBarTemplateSettings
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
